summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Monday Knights website deployment - all core features working correctly

minor_issues.issue: Success message briefly appears before form close, may be missed by users
minor_issues.note: Form submission works correctly but success message timing could be improved

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with Monday Knights branding and background image
About Us menu opens overlay with correct content about Revolutionary work
Contact Us menu opens overlay with individual/business form selection
Individual contact form fields appear and accept input correctly
Business contact form fields appear and accept input correctly
Form validation works (privacy agreement, required fields)
Contact form submissions are processed successfully by backend API
Events and Announcements menu opens overlay with header image
Events overlay shows default 'no events' message when no posts exist
Admin panel is accessible at /admin route
Admin login form loads with all required fields
Admin authentication works with provided credentials
Admin dashboard loads with all tabs (About Us, Events & Posts, Contact Submissions)
